sentences.text: What I just dictated into ChatGPT Work > Okay, so I received a lot of DMs for, I did a call out for ChatGPT Work, basically early access beta group.
I want you to go through all my DMs on Twitter and then just take all of them that mention ChatGPT Work.
It's like a lot of them, thousands, and put them all in a spreadsheet.
What I want in the spreadsheet is the name, I want the link to the the DM, so I can go back to it quickly.
I want the post that they did, but remove any new lines, so it's just in a single cell.
And then I want a column which is basically your assessment of what they're doing, right?
So for example, if it's like sales, put sales, if it's marketing, put marketing, if it's design, put design.
Come up with your own taxonomy for how to classify their work.
I expect the taxonomy to have like, you know, roughly 8 to 12 labels maybe, total.

And then also put a rating for, like, they normally have to describe what they're currently doing with ChatGPT Work, use that to put a rating in the fifth column on how sophisticated their workflow already is.

We're gonna be selecting a cohort of different people of different levels of sophistication, so we're gonna be like taking, you know, maybe like a couple dozens from like, a high level of sophistication, we're gonna take in the middle of a cohort, and then like low level of sophistication, so we have good representation and can test new features and get good feedback from a diverse group at different levels of adoption.
So create that spreadsheet, go through all my DMs.

paragraphs.zh: 我刚刚口述给 ChatGPT Work 的内容 > 好的，我收到了很多 DMs，因为我发起了一个关于 ChatGPT Work 的征集，基本上是面向 early access beta group（抢先体验测试组）的。我希望你把我在 Twitter 上所有的 DMs 都过一遍，然后把所有提到 ChatGPT Work 的都整理出来。数量很多，成千上万条，把它们全部放进一个 spreadsheet（电子表格）里。我希望表格里有姓名、DM 的链接，这样我可以很快回去查看。我还想要他们发的那条内容，但要去掉所有换行，让它只占一个单元格。然后我还想要一列，基本上是你对他们在做什么的判断，对吧？比如如果是 sales，就填 sales；如果是 marketing，就填 marketing；如果是 design，就填 design。你自己设计一套 taxonomy（分类体系）来给他们的工作分类。我预计这个 taxonomy 总共大概有 8 到 12 个标签。然后还要加一个评分，因为他们通常需要描述自己当前如何使用 ChatGPT Work，你要根据这个，在第五列里给出一个评分，判断他们现有 workflow（工作流）已经有多成熟。我们会挑选一个 cohort（群组），包含不同成熟度水平的人，所以我们会从高成熟度里选大概几十个，从中等水平里选一批，再从低成熟度里选一些，这样就能有良好的代表性，测试新功能，并从不同采用阶段、不同水平的多样化人群那里获得高质量反馈。所以，把这个 spreadsheet 做出来，把我所有 DMs 都过一遍。祝你好运！

sentences.text: My job is basically delegating to ChatGPT Work now.
Can't stop using dictation and have it do everything

paragraphs.zh: 我现在的工作基本上就是把事情委派给 ChatGPT Work。完全停不下来，一直在用语音口述，然后让它把所有事情都做掉。

sentences.text: ChatGPT Work is for ✅ Creating and hosting sites ✅ Managing your emails for you ✅ Summarizing mountains of documents ✅ Creating top-notch docs, sheet and slides Already in your mobile app or on included in Plus, Pro, Business and Enterprise plans

paragraphs.zh: ChatGPT Work 用于 ✅ 创建并托管网站 ✅ 帮你管理电子邮件 ✅ 总结成堆的文档 ✅ 创建高质量的 docs、sheet 和 slides 已经在你的 mobile app 中可用，或者已包含在 Plus、Pro、Business 和 Enterprise 套餐中
